summary: Phase 1 Merchant Settings enhancement testing complete. All backend APIs (26/26 tests) and frontend UI flows tested successfully. PIN protection, Cashier management, and Business info update features all working correctly.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings for select/option elements - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

seed_data_creation: Test cashier 'UITEST01' created during UI testing
